data.body:
=== HANDOFF (2026-06-14) — E0–E4 DONE, E5–E9 REMAIN ===

STATE: origin/main @ eda41cc7 (Merge PR #4 signing). Local main == origin/main, clean.
Editable build live (pipx, .pth -> src/); dev venv /tmp/rebar-dev. Full non-integration
suite GREEN at 1794 (post-signing-merge); concurrency matrix (-m integration) 4 green.

DONE (all children closed):
- E0 knobby-mile-gob (3a53e20) argparse CLI skeleton + help goldens + middleware
- E1 pelt-twig-taboo (c64c889) entrypoint cutover
- E2 grubby-logic-hack read-ish/quality in-process
- E3 isle-wren-holly: write/lifecycle in-process — relocate txn core -> rebar._commands.txn
  (e6e645ae); transition/reopen + unblock port -> rebar.graph._unblock (41217cc7); claim
  (bf24646d); compact/compact-all + compact-on-close rewire (9f7bd246); scratch (46caa2cb);
  delete (7ddced5c). Bug stiff-mop-lane closed (dual-leg lock verified preserved).
- E4 scaly-bleat-haul: fsck (56e130ff), fsck-recover (07d7b495), init + AUTO-INIT CONSENT
  GATE (a9c4dd64). NEW BEHAVIOR: the store is never created without consent — interactive
  TTY prompts [Y/n] default Yes; non-interactive (CI/pipe/library/MCP) ERRORS; explicit
  rebar init / init_repo() bypass. Legacy bash dispatcher keeps silent auto-init (E7-deleted).

IN-PROCESS NOW (rebar._cli routes; library rewired off _run): all reads, leaf writes, gates,
field-reads, lookups, descendants, transition/reopen/claim, compact/compact-all, scratch,
delete, fsck, fsck-recover, init, AND sign/verify-signature (from PR #4). Bash kept as
parity-pinned 2nd impl; deletion back-loads to E7/E8.

PR #4 (signing) MERGED — implications for remaining tiers:
- New SIGNATURE event: in reducer KNOWN_EVENT_TYPES + processor (last-writer-wins into
  state['signature']) + store allow-list + compaction (absorbed into compiled_state; my
  compact.py uses rebar.reducer.KNOWN_EVENT_TYPES so it's already consistent).
- Story/epic close gate is now _signature_gate (rebar._commands.txn) — signature certification
  SUPERSEDES the verdict-hash gate; --verdict-hash deprecated/ignored. .closure-key no longer
  minted by init; .signing-key minted (chmod 600) + gitignored.
- rebar.sign_manifest / rebar.verify_signature (library) + sign_manifest/verify_signature (MCP).

STILL CATEGORY-B PASSTHROUGH (-> bash dispatcher via _cli._passthrough, now consent-gated):
bridge-status, purge-bridge, bridge-fsck, bridge-probe, reconcile (reconcile has its own arm).

REMAINING (E5–E9, not yet ticketed):
- E5  bridge-status / purge-bridge in-process (bridge surface; bridge-fsck/bridge-probe already py).
- E5b rewire rebar_reconciler off the compat shims (ticket_reducer -> rebar.reducer; bare
  event_append -> rebar._store.event_append; drop engine_env / sys.path dances). ** LIVE-DIG
  JIRA GATE binds here + E5: before close, live end-to-end probe vs real Jira DIG project
  (JIRA_PROJECT=DIG; JIRA_URL/USER/API_TOKEN in env), every field bidirectionally,
  create->validate->delete throwaway issues. PAUSE for user go-ahead before first live DIG writes.
- E5c ticket_txn relocation: DONE in E3 (rebar._commands.txn). Bare _engine/event_append.py
  deletion waits on E5b (reconciler) + shim cleanup.
- E6  delete compat shims (ticket_reducer/, ticket_graph/, ticket_reads.py, ticket_resolver.py,
  ticket_output.py) after rewiring every importer; assert-gone test per shim.
- E7  delete the dispatcher (_engine/rebar) + engine_env/PYTHONPATH machinery + engine_dir
  zipimport assertion + jq prereq + flock(1)/mkdir discovery; retire machinery tests same commit.
  Also delete the now-shimmed ticket_txn.py + ticket-unblock.py + the ported .sh once suites move.
  NOTE: when the dispatcher dies, the legacy silent-auto-init path dies with it (consent gate
  becomes the only path) — update test-ticket-autoinit.sh accordingly.
- E8  translate ~107 .sh suites to pytest; delete tests/lib/{suite-engine,assert}.sh + collector.
- E9  docs (architecture offender table -> empty; bash-migration §7 DONE) + exhaustive
  live-dogfood validation + soak-evidence comment + close adult-oxide-slave (+ then nervy-hold-dip).

PATTERN (followed E0–E4, keep doing): characterize bash arm empirically -> port reusing
rebar.reducer/graph/_commands/_store/_engine_support -> route argparse in-process + rewire
library off _run -> dual-run byte-parity test (tests/interfaces/test_e*_*.py) -> targeted +
full suite green -> commit green + per-command child ticket. NO bash deleted before E7/E8.
ENV gotchas: always --basetemp=/tmp/rebar-bt-X (macOS tmp race); _TICKET_TEST_NO_SYNC=1 in
parity tests; full suite ~11min; never git stash uncommitted migration work.
